SERIES B FUNDING TERM SHEET

This Term Sheet (the "SPA") is entered into on this 15th day of October, 2023, between Invictus Ventures Pte Ltd (UEN: T23LL1234X), represented by Dr. Tan Wei Ming, and Innovatech Solutions Pte Ltd (UEN: 200912345H), represented by Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah. 

Investment Amount: The SPA shall facilitate a Series B funding round of SGD 5,000,000. The parties acknowledge that the project status is currently pending regulatory approval.

Contact Information: Dr. Tan Wei Ming can be reached at +65 9123 4567 or via email at wei.ming.tan@example.sg. Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah can be reached at +65 9876 5432 or via email at siti.aishah@innovatech.sg.

Investor NRIC: For identification purposes, Dr. Tan Wei Ming's NRIC is S1234567A, accessible via https://secureportal.sg/user/S1‍2‍3‍4‍5‍6‍7‍A.

Investor Obligations: The investors agree to the terms set forth in the SPA, including a commitment to provide quarterly updates on the project plan without any negative implications on the current operations.

The parties agree that any disputes arising under this SPA shall be resolved amicably.
